channel.title: Pages on Tyler Burleigh
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Tyler Burleigh

item.title: Writings
item.description: I’ve authored peer-reviewed scholarly articles and white papers. As of 2019-09-21, my papers were cited 299 times and my h-index was 8. (source: Google Scholar) Papers Uncanny Valley Burleigh, T. J. (2015). A challenge to the study of individual differences in uncanny valley sensitivity: The importance of looking at individual-level response patterns. Interaction Studies, 16(2). [PDF] Ferrey, A., Burleigh, T. J., & Fenske, M. (2015). Stimulus-category competition, inhibition and affective devaluation: A novel account of the Uncanny Valley.
